summary_en: Self-tender offer: 1,070,000 shares (10.97% of shares outstanding) from Honda Motor Co. at discounted market price (discount rate to be disclosed). Execution method: public open offer (ToSTNeT-3 ineligible due to low liquidity). Settlement date not yet specified. Honda retains ~15% ownership post-acquisition. Concurrent sale by Tanaka of 1,000,000 Honda shares to optimize capital structure.
title_en: Notice regarding acquisition of treasury shares and implementation of public open offer for treasury shares
translation_en_brief: On 14 May 2026, Tanaka Seimitsu Kogyo announced a self-tender offer to acquire 1,070,000 common shares (10.97% of outstanding shares) from Honda Motor Co., its principal shareholder and major customer. The company will use the public open-offer method due to low market liquidity (average daily volume ~3,630 shares). The tender price will be set at a discount to recent market prices; the specific discount rate and offer period remain under discussion with Honda. Post-acquisition, Honda will maintain approximately 15% ownership. In parallel, Tanaka will sell 1,000,000 shares of Honda (out of 1,526,000 held) via off-exchange transaction to improve capital efficiency and financial flexibility. The objectives include optimizing capital structure, enhancing ROI, strengthening management autonomy, and broadening the customer base beyond Honda.
